mapper.select: { call GET_PROFESSOR_STUDENT_LIST( #{professorUserId, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{courseId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{division, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyword, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grade, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{major, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{page, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{size, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{result, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summary, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=com.example.backend.mapper.ProfessorStudentMapper.StudentSummaryResultMap}, #{students, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=com.example.backend.mapper.ProfessorStudentMapper.StudentItemResultMap} ) }
